review: The two fans describe the concert as solid but unremarkable, highlighting only The Other One as a special moment. No details are given about the tape source or sound quality, leaving the technical side uncertain.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues.
